description:
Melinda Ortner — self-titled CD (2008). Indie singer-songwriter; 12 tracks including “Heartbeats,” “Secret,” and “Believe,” plus several recorded live at the Dakota Lounge.

**Why a new owner would be happy**

- The disc is hand-signed by the artist (signature in teal marker) — genuine keepsake interest.
- An indie / personal release; the live tracks make it a one-of-a-kind document.

**Condition:** disc shows light surface marks.
name: Melinda Ortner (signed)
